subcodes.first_line: The Most Glorious Pen summoneth at all times the peoples of the contingent realm unto the Most Exalted Horizon, that they may partake of the bounties of the Days of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم ابهی در کل احیان اهل امکان را بافق اعلی دعوت مینماید تا از فضل ایام الله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation
